hooks.command: cd "D:/Codebox/PROJECTS/DFMT/internal/cli" && .dfmt/dfmt recall --format md 2>/dev/null > .dfmt/last-recall.md || echo '# No recall data' > .dfmt/last-recall.md
hooks.statusMessage: Saving session snapshot for next session...

hooks.command: if [ -f "D:/Codebox/PROJECTS/DFMT/internal/cli/.dfmt/last-recall.md" ]; then echo '--- Previous session summary ---' && cat "D:/Codebox/PROJECTS/DFMT/internal/cli/.dfmt/last-recall.md" && echo '--- End of previous session ---'; fi
